summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Way2News-style news app. All major functionality working correctly including bilingual support, AI integration, admin features, and user interactions.

minor_bugs.issue: SSL certificate verification failed with example.com test URL
minor_bugs.impact: URL scraping test failed, but functionality works with real URLs like TechCrunch
minor_bugs.workaround: Use valid URLs with proper SSL certificates

ui_bugs.issue: DOM element detachment after pin operation causes edit button click to fail
ui_bugs.impact: Edit functionality may be interrupted after pin/unpin operations
ui_bugs.workaround: Refresh page or wait for DOM to stabilize before editing

passed_tests: Homepage loads with category chips and proper empty state
Language toggle switches perfectly between English and Telugu
Category filtering - all category buttons clickable and functional
Admin panel navigation and stats display
Manual news article creation with bilingual support
URL scraping with AI rephrasing and Telugu translation (tested with TechCrunch)
News feed displays created articles with proper layout
Article modal opens with full content display
Save/bookmark functionality from both card and modal
Saved Articles page with proper empty state handling
Admin pin/unpin article functionality with visual feedback
Bottom navigation between Home, Saved, and Admin pages
Backend API endpoints: categories, news feed, admin CRUD operations
AI integration using Emergent LLM key for content processing
